decision_commentary: Completeness scored 3: the rubric requires four specific assessment dimensions — design engagement level, budget realism relative to program, scope clarity, and collaborative working style indicators. The deliverable provides assessment_dimensions with five numeric scores (budget_alignment, site_readiness, decision_clarity, design_engagement, project_feasibility) which cover design engagement and budget realism but do not explicitly address 'collaborative working style indicators' as a named dimension. Three of four rubric-specified dimensions are clearly present; collaborative working style is absent by name. Accuracy scored 3: meeting_notes summarize Elena's interpretation ('Carlos is design-engaged, has a clear vision') without separating what the client said versus Elena's interpretation — rubric requires attribution to be clearly separated; context allows inference but it is not explicitly delineated. Clarity scored 5: recommendation is explicit — 'advance' — no ambiguity; rationale directly references all required supporting data. State_sync scored 3: simulated run — no live Asana update to discovery_completed. Timing scored 5: fit assessment produced in correct pipeline order. Decision_readiness scored 5: any red flags would be documented; Marcela can decide immediately; all assessment scores documented with rationale.
celia_routing_notes: Celia routing for DG-02 scored separately.
